title: Checkpoint: Number Adventure
summary: Mix numbers, updates, and a choice.
mission_prompt: Start score at 1, add 2, and print the score if it is bigger than 2.
starter_code:
score = 1
score = score + 2
if score > 2:
    print(score)
learning_goals: Print only when the if question is true.
hints: score = score + 2 changes the old score.
The if line asks whether the score is bigger than 2.
adult_guidance: Ask the child to track the score with fingers: 1, then 3.
